name: Cambridge North

links.title: Online survey
links.description:
If you live or work in Cambridge, we want to hear from you.
We’re asking residents to fill in our online survey to help us understand the issues that are concerning you.

description: Looking after Cambridge North, we are committed to making it a safer place to live, work and visit. You can contact the team online to discuss any concerns or issues you may have â?? follow the link below for team contact details.
